# Workflow System

## Problem

AI coding assistants lack awareness of where you are in the development lifecycle. They treat every prompt as isolated, losing context about the broader goal.

## Proposal

A phase-based workflow that guides AI assistants through idea → analyze → blueprint → plan → build → validate.
